name: gog
description: Fast, script-friendly CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, and 15+ Google Workspace services with JSON-first output.

install.source: git clone https://github.com/steipete/gogcli.git && cd gogcli && make

commands.name: gmail search
commands.description: Search Gmail messages with Gmail query syntax

commands.name: docs cat
commands.description: Read a Google Doc's content as plain text

commands.name: sheets get
commands.description: Read cell values from a Google Sheet

use_cases: Search and read Gmail messages to gather context for tasks
Check calendar availability and create events for scheduling workflows
Search and download files from Google Drive for analysis
Read and update Google Sheets data as a structured data source
Send Gmail messages or Chat notifications as part of automated pipelines
agent_metadata.example_workflow: gog gmail search 'from:client newer_than:1d' --json --max 5 | jq '.[0].threadId' | xargs -I{} gog gmail thread get {} --include-body
